error.signature: Twilio sends duplicate SMS because webhook endpoint returned non-2xx or timed out

verdict.summary: Twilio retries status callbacks up to 4 times if your endpoint doesn't return 2xx within 15 seconds. If the webhook triggers reply sending, each retry causes duplicate outbound messages.

dead_ends.action: Return 200 only after sending the reply SMS
dead_ends.why_fails: If sending the reply takes >15s, Twilio retries. Your handler sends another reply on retry. User gets 2-4 duplicate SMS.
Status callback retries cannot be fully disabled for all webhook types. Some retries are hardcoded.

workarounds.action: Return TwiML immediately, queue reply sending asynchronously
workarounds.how: Return empty <Response/> immediately. Process and reply via REST API from a background job.

workarounds.action: Implement idempotency using MessageSid from Twilio
